tweet.text:
RT @greenlight: In love with this rep from Harrison Phillips
@Beau_Allen | @horribleharry99 | @BetMGM https://t.co/65Xst9dUCR

RT @GuyFieri: Guess which Guy doesn’t play for the @Vikings 😂
Omg, the guys crushed a cameo on DDD in Minneapolis! https://t.co/mzxMIS196g

RT @NFL: Harrison "Tommy Shelby" Phillips
📺: #NYJvsMIN -- 9:30AM ET on NFL Network 📱: Stream on #NFLPlus https://t.co/63jAKA2gkY

RT @Vikings: HOF HARRY
With his sack in the 2nd quarter @harrismith22 became the 7th DB in NFL history with 30+ INTs and 20+ sacks. https:…
